query: SELECT id, name, role, lockedRole, lockedDescription, characterVisualDetails, isLocked FROM videoCharacters WHERE name LIKE '%Tim%' OR name LIKE '%tim%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute SELECT id, name, role, lockedRole, lockedDescription, characterVisualDetails, isLocked FROM videoCharacters WHERE name LIKE '%Tim%' OR name LIKE '%tim%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;

rows.name: Tim
rows.lockedDescription: Tim, Lead Singer and Guitarist: Male, appearing to be in his early to mid-30s, with fair skin and warm undertones. His hair is dark chestnut brown, short on the sides with a faded undercut, and longer on top, slicked back and slightly textured. His eyes are a striking light blue, almond-shaped with a slight upward tilt at the outer corners. He has an oval face shape with a defined jawline. A full, well-maintained beard and mustache, dark brown matching his hair, covers his chin, jaw, and upper lip. A small, dark mole is visible on his right cheekbone. His build appears to be medium, as only his upper chest and shoulders are visible. He is wearing a dark charcoal grey crew-neck t-shirt. No instrument or playing style is observable in the provided image. CONSISTENCY RULE: This character's appearance MUST NOT change between scenes.
rows.characterVisualDetails: Wears a cool black leather jacket - has a rock star front man image. Slim build,  Short hair and facially looks exactly like his uploaded photo.

rows.name: Tim
rows.lockedDescription: Tim, Lead Singer and Guitarist: This is a male, appearing to be in his late 20s to mid-30s, with fair skin and warm undertones. He has short, dark chestnut brown hair on top, styled back with a slight wave and visible texture, and a very short, faded buzz cut on the sides and back. His eyes are almond-shaped and a clear light blue. His face shape is oval, with a defined jawline partially obscured by a full, neatly trimmed dark brown beard and mustache, approximately 1-2 inches in length, with no visible stubble on the cheeks. A small, dark mole is visible on his right cheek. His build appears to be medium, and he is wearing a dark charcoal grey crew-neck t-shirt. No instrument or playing style is visible in the provided image. CONSISTENCY RULE: This character's appearance MUST NOT change between scenes.
rows.characterVisualDetails: Wears a cool black leather jacket - has a rock star front man image. Slim build,  Short hair and facially looks exactly like his uploaded photo.

rows.name: Tim
rows.lockedDescription: A male, appearing in his late 30s to early 40s, with a fair, light peach-toned complexion, is depicted. He has short, dark brown hair, styled in a side part with the top swept to the right, exhibiting a slight wave and glossy texture, while the sides are closely faded. His eyes are almond-shaped and a striking light blue-grey, with a slight upward tilt at the outer corners. He has a square jawline and a full, neatly trimmed dark brown beard, slightly darker than his hair, covering his chin and cheeks, connected to a mustache. A small dark mole is visible on his right cheekbone. He wears a dark grey crew-neck t-shirt.  Tim sings and also plays a sunburst Gibson Les Paul,
rows.characterVisualDetails: Black Leather Jacket, Jeans with attached Key Chain, Plays a Sunburst Gibson Les Paul Electric Guitar and is the front man and lead singer.
